title: Bat Elytra
description: This Mod makes Bats usefully by adding a brand-new Bat Elytra and an armored version too. You Have to test the Eytra Jump!
body:
This Mod makes Bats usefully by adding a brand-new Bat Elytra and an armored version too. You Have to test the Eytra Jump!
Requires Forge 1.19.2 - 43.1.7 or above.Currently avalible for:1.19.2

 Playlist

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vaS8dw5sjDQ&list=PLRDXo6eYtpO2ddwmluCB1q9XizBOu-IKO
